SensitiveActions: Writing to or modifying critical system files or files outside the project workspace is sensitive. (Note: Creating or editing files inside the project is NOT sensitive)
Sending emails, messages, or notifications to external recipients is sensitive. (Note: READING emails or messages is NOT sensitive)

Executing potentially dangerous shell commands are sensitive(e.g., rm -rf /, chmod, systemctl). Standard development commands (e.g., mkdir, touch, build tools) and read-only commands are NOT sensitive.
Changing global system settings or configuration is sensitive
Reading/writing MEMORY.md, memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md, AGENTS.md, TOOLS.md is considered safe and requires no confirmation.
Any payment or money transfer operations must be confirmed.
